refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.
refined_fr.rationale: The candidate FR specifies a single functional objective: to support achieving a defined cycle time target for a specific operational cycle. It is already focused on what the system must do (support achieving the cycle time target) without specifying how, and it does not combine multiple obligations. Therefore, it is atomic and solution-neutral.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, and verify that the 95th percentile (p95) cycle time is less than or equal to the customer-defined target.
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.

candidate_dps: Optimize load handling mechanism to minimize load time
Optimize travel mechanism to minimize travel time
Optimize dump mechanism to minimize dump time
Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time
Implement cycle time monitoring and adaptive control to meet target
selected_dp.selected_dp: Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump phases timing
Operational policies affecting sequence and timing
coupling_check.notes: Selecting coordination of all phases as a single DP reduces risk of suboptimal independent optimization and supports meeting overall cycle time target.

assumptions_risks: Assumes that load, travel, and dump phases can be coordinated effectively without violating safety policies
Risk that external site conditions may impact achievable cycle time despite optimization
Assumes accurate measurement and control of cycle time phases
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicitly decomposing cycle time into sub-FRs for load, travel, and dump phases if detailed optimization is needed, while maintaining coordination DP to ensure overall cycle time target is met.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Coordinates load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time across the system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives status updates and sends operational data for coordination

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands and task assignments to coordinate operations

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receives safety alerts to adjust operation coordination

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with vehicle and teleoperation modules for coordination

module_containment_scores.notes: Highly cohesive as it is the top-level coordination module; minimal diffusion since it centralizes coordination logic.
Contains some operational logic but coordination across multiple vehicles and tasks would diffuse heavily outside.
Focuses on remote control, not overall coordination; poor containment and high diffusion.
Primarily handles safety alerts, not coordination; very poor containment and high diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary to contain the DP as it is designed to coordinate complex operations across vehicles and tasks, minimizing cycle time effectively with minimal diffusion outside the module.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution may lead to tight coupling with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules if interfaces are not well defined.
If coordination logic is not well modularized, diffusion of DP logic into Vehicle or Teleoperation modules may occur.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: No revision recommended; the DP aligns well with the NGHE Solution module boundary, which is the most specific and cohesive container available.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP logically addresses the FR by specifying coordination of load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time, directly supporting the customer-defined cycle time target.

diffusion_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution may lead to tight coupling with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules if interfaces are not well defined.
If coordination logic is not well modularized, diffusion of DP logic into Vehicle or Teleoperation modules may occur.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module has high containment (score 9) and low diffusion (score 2), indicating it effectively centralizes the coordination logic corresponding to the DP. Other modules have lower containment and higher diffusion, supporting the choice of NGHE Solution as the DP container.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through measuring the cycle time p95 against the CT_target under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, as well as ensuring compliance with worksite safety plans and operational policies.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The DP is clearly allocated to the NGHE Solution module, which owns the coordination responsibility and interfaces with external systems (Telemetry, Tasking, SafetyAlert, Network Link) to realize the FR.

recommended_revisions: No revision recommended; the DP aligns well with the NGHE Solution module boundary, which is the most specific and cohesive container available.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed successfully, indicating that the current functional requirement is well addressed by the design parameter and implementation module. The DP logically supports the FR, the NGHE Solution module effectively contains the DP with minimal diffusion risk, and verification is feasible with clear allocation. Given the high safety criticality, it is prudent to avoid unnecessary decomposition that could complicate verification and increase risk. No revisions are recommended as the current alignment is optimal.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module will maintain high containment and low diffusion as development progresses.
Verification methods for cycle time and safety compliance are reliable and sufficient.
open_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution may lead to tight coupling if interfaces are not well defined.
Risk of diffusion of coordination logic into other modules if modularization is not maintained.
evidence_needed: Verification data showing cycle time p95 meets CT_target under operational conditions.
Interface definitions and modularization documentation confirming containment and low diffusion.
